mapper.select: select cd_group_id , cd_group_nm , cd_group_desc , expnsn_str_val1 , expnsn_str_val2 , expnsn_str_val3 from msf_cd_group_bas where cd_group_id = #{groupCode} and use_yn = 'Y' and to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') between pstng_start_date and pstng_end_date

select cd_group_id , dtl_cd , dtl_cd_nm , dtl_cd_abbr_nm , dtl_cd_desc , up_grp_cd , sort_odrg , expnsn_str_val1 , expnsn_str_val2 , expnsn_str_val3 , file_path_nm from msf_cd_dtl where cd_group_id = #{groupCode} and use_yn = 'Y' and to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') between pstng_start_date and pstng_end_date order by sort_odrg, dtl_cd
